allow: Bash(gh pr create --title 'feat: full visual redesign with CSS-var theme system [SPEC-001]' --body ':*)
Bash(git commit -m 'fix: rename footer.tsx to Footer.tsx for case-sensitive Linux builds [SPEC-001]:*)

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps={**p.get\('dependencies',{}\), **p.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}; print\('vitest:', deps.get\('vitest','NOT FOUND'\)\); print\('gsap:', deps.get\('gsap','NOT FOUND'\)\); print\('@testing-library/react:', deps.get\('@testing-library/react','NOT FOUND'\)\); print\('@playwright/test:', deps.get\('@playwright/test','NOT FOUND'\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps={**p.get\('dependencies',{}\), **p.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}; [print\(f'{k}: {v}'\) for k,v in deps.items\(\) if any\(x in k for x in ['vitest','testing-library','jsdom','playwright']\)]")
